data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Reaches New High with Recent Adjustment
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining difficulty experienced an adjustment at 22:47 UTC+8 last night, at block height 915,264. The difficulty increased by 4.63% to reach 142.34 T, setting a new historical record.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $116,612 and $117,900 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $116,833, down by -0.35%.

data.title: Canadian police seize $40 million in crypto assets after shutting down TradeOgre
data.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) announced that they have shut down the unregistered local cryptocurrency exchange TradeOgre and seized crypto assets worth 56 million Canadian dollars (approximately 40 million US dollars), the largest cryptocurrency seizure in Canadian history. TradeOgre was reportedly under investigation since June 2024, following a Europol investigation. Police discovered that the platform operated as an unregistered money services business, failed to conduct customer identification, and was suspected of laundering criminal funds. The exchange has been shut down. (The Block)

data.title: BARD is now listed on Bitget CandyBomb, and contract trading unlocks token airdrops
data.description: Bitget CandyBomb has launched BARD, a project with a total prize pool of 50,000 BARD. Individuals can earn up to 200 BARD by completing specific contract trading volume tasks. Detailed rules are available on the Bitget official platform. To participate, click the "Join Now" button to register. The event ends at 2:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 26th.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Kyuzo's Friends (KO)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Kyuzo's Friends (KO) on September 20, 2025.Eligible users can claim their airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Binance: Astra Nova Booster task verification API is temporarily interrupted, and officials are working with the project to resolve the issue
data.description: Binance Wallet officially announced on the X platform that due to an API outage for verification tasks in Phase 1 of the Astra Nova Booster program, some users are temporarily unable to complete verification. They are working closely with the project team to resolve the issue and are encouraged to try again later.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed GMTech Inc. and WebKey have reached a strategic partnership
data.description: Nasdaq-listed GMTech Inc. (NASDAQ: GMTH) announced a strategic partnership with WebKey, marking the official launch of WebKey's 1+N global capital market strategy. WebKey's affiliated funds in Dubai, the United States, and the British Virgin Islands (BVI) have successfully secured SEC, SFC, and MiCA licenses, enabling compliant capital operations for RWAs and STOs. Under this strategic partnership, GMTech and WebKey will jointly develop blockchain financial infrastructure and mobile ecosystems, driving innovation in stock market capitalization and liquidity.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Ends Speculation on NBA Star Kevin Durant's Blocked Bitcoin Account
data.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong restores Kevin Durant's lost Bitcoin account after nearly 10 years
source: https://u.today/coinbase-ceo-ends-speculation-on-nba-star-kevin-durants-blocked-bitcoin-account

data.title: IG Group acquires majority stake in crypto trading platform Independent Reserve for AUD 109.6 million
data.description: Online trading platform IG Group has acquired a majority stake in Australian cryptocurrency exchange Independent Reserve for AUD 109.6 million (US$72.4 million). IG will reportedly acquire a 70% stake in the company initially, with the option to acquire the remaining 30% based on future performance. The transaction, which is subject to regulatory approval and expected to close in early 2026, is valued at AUD 178 million (US$117.6 million). (Coindesk)

data.title: Coinbase reserves hit $112 billion, a four-year high
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst CryptoOnchain revealed that Coinbase's total reserves, including BTC, ETH, and ERC-20 stablecoins, have reached $112 billion, the highest level since November 2021. This increase reflects growing confidence among institutional and retail investors, as well as a resumption of capital inflows. The analysis noted that increases in reserves at major exchanges typically accompany increased market liquidity and stronger price momentum. This four-year high in reserves may signal a new phase of demand and accumulation, preparing the market for the next major rally.

data.title: 46% Use Crypto to Hedge Inflation, 63% for Passive Income — What This Means for Investors
data.description:
Amid rising global inflation and regional economic pressures, a growing share of users now see crypto as a tool to protect wealth and generate income.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/46-now-use-crypto-as-inflation-hedge-63-enter-for-passive-income-what-this-means-for-investors/

data.title: ASTER is now available on Binance Alpha
data.description: The official page shows that Binance Alpha has launched ASTER.

data.title: Bitlight Labs Completes $9.6 Million Pre-A Round of Funding, Led by Amber Group and Fundamental Labs
data.description: According to official news, Bitlight Labs, the developer of the RGB protocol infrastructure, announced the completion of a $9.6 million Pre-A round of financing, co-led by Amber Group and Fundamental Labs. The funds will be used to launch the RGB-Lightning integration and help build a Bitcoin-native stablecoin payment channel.

data.title: Ray Dalio Discusses Threats to Currency Order at Singapore Forum
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio expressed concerns about the stability of currency systems during a panel discussion at the "Future China Global Forum" in Singapore on Friday. Dalio highlighted the potential threats to the current monetary order, suggesting that various factors could contribute to the decline of the American empire.

Dalio emphasized the challenges faced by fiat currencies in maintaining their role as a store of wealth. He noted the increasing prominence of non-fiat currencies, such as gold and cryptocurrencies, as alternative means of wealth preservation. Dalio's remarks underscore the shifting dynamics in global finance and the growing interest in assets outside traditional monetary systems.

data.title: Former Coinbase Ventures member: Base token's initial market capitalization may be around $20 billion, and token functionality may be similar to ETH
data.description: According to a recent interview with Unchained, Coinbase's Level 2 project, Base, announced it is exploring the possibility of issuing a token. This move marks a significant shift from Base's previous position that it had never planned to issue a token. Ryan Ye, a former member of Coinbase Ventures, predicts that the Base token's initial market capitalization could be approximately $20 billion, with the potential to rise to $40 billion to $50 billion. He believes that the token issuance will significantly boost the Base ecosystem and attract more developers and users. Ryan speculates that the token distribution could include: 20%-40% going to Coinbase, approximately 20% going to an independent community treasury, and the remainder distributed to the community through airdrops or public sales. He also suggests that the Base token could function similarly to Ethereum's ETH, partially used for on-chain fee burn, while potentially becoming a core liquidity asset for DeFi. Furthermore, Base has integrated with Solana on its testnet. Ryan believes this demonstrates that Base recognizes Solana as its primary competitor and is using this initiative to attract developers. He pointed out that the competition between Base and Solana mainly focuses on user culture and DeFi liquidity. Base is more inclined towards DeFi liquidity, while Solana has an advantage in user experience and consumer culture.

data.title: A week later, whales bought another 11,200 SOL, worth $2.75 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale bought another 11,233 SOL worth $2.75 million. The whale withdrew 101,974 SOL worth $16 million from the exchange a week ago.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Ark of Panda (AOP) with a minimum score of 200 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha will list Ark of Panda (AOP). Trading on Alpha will begin at 20:00 (UTC+8) on September 19, 2025. After trading begins, users with at least 200 Binance Alpha Points will be eligible to claim an airdrop of 1,280 AOP tokens. This airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour while the promotion is ongoing. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha promotion page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: SEC fast-tracks spot crypto ETFs beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description:
19-9-2025 – The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission has greenlit rule changes that streamline approvals for spot cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds, setting the stage for products beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. On September 17, the agency endorsed proposals from the New York Stock Exchange, Nasdaq, and Cboe Global Markets to implement uniform listing criteria for digital asset [
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/sec-fast-tracks-spot-crypto-etfs-beyond-bitcoin-and-ethereum/
